description_long: This house features a sprawling, single-story layout with an attached two-story section, set on a rectangular plot with a large driveway and a wraparound porch. The exterior is finished in light blue siding with white trim, complemented by a dark gray gable roof. Multiple sets of steps lead up to the main entry, which is accentuated by a covered porch and white railings. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with several grouped in rows along the longer facades. The property includes a spacious wooden deck at the rear and side, providing ample outdoor living space. A detached car is visible in the driveway, indicating vehicular access and residential use.
description: A large, light blue house with a gable roof, wraparound porch, and a mix of single and two-story sections, featuring white trim and a spacious driveway.
description_view_0: This view highlights the long side of the house with multiple windows, the wraparound porch, and the main steps leading up to the entry.
description_view_1: From this angle, the driveway and car are prominent, and the two-story section at the rear is visible, along with the deck and side yard.
description_view_2: The front facade is shown here, featuring the main entryway with steps, a covered porch, and a white gate leading to the driveway.
description_view_3: This perspective emphasizes the rear and side deck, the two-story section, and the transition between the porch and the main house.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a covered porch with steps, white railings, and a decorative gate leading from the driveway.
